MSSQL.name: Recently Created Database Users
MSSQL.description: Detects newly created accounts in the last 24 hours. May indicate unauthorized account creation.
MSSQL.query: SELECT name, create_date, type_desc FROM sys.database_principals WHERE create_date > DATEADD(day, -1, GETDATE()) AND type IN ('S','U','G') ORDER BY create_date DESC;

MSSQL.name: Sysadmin Role Members
MSSQL.description: Lists all logins with sysadmin privileges. Any unexpected entry is a critical finding.
MSSQL.query: SELECT sp.name AS login_name, sp.type_desc, sp.is_disabled FROM sys.server_principals sp INNER JOIN sys.server_role_members srm ON sp.principal_id = srm.member_principal_id INNER JOIN sys.server_principals r ON srm.role_principal_id = r.principal_id WHERE r.name = 'sysadmin' ORDER BY sp.name;

MSSQL.name: Orphaned Database Users
MSSQL.description: Lists database users without a matching server login. Can be used as backdoor accounts.
MSSQL.query: SELECT dp.name AS db_user, dp.type_desc, dp.create_date FROM sys.database_principals dp LEFT JOIN sys.server_principals sp ON dp.sid = sp.sid WHERE dp.type IN ('S','U') AND dp.name NOT IN ('dbo','guest','INFORMATION_SCHEMA','sys') AND sp.sid IS NULL ORDER BY dp.name;

PostgreSQL.name: Privileged Roles
PostgreSQL.description: Lists all roles with superuser, createdb or createrole privileges.
PostgreSQL.query: SELECT rolname, rolsuper, rolcreatedb, rolcreaterole FROM pg_roles WHERE rolcreatedb = true OR rolcreaterole = true OR rolsuper = true ORDER BY rolname;

MongoDB.name: List Database Users
MongoDB.description: Lists all users and their roles in the admin database.

MongoDB.name: List All Databases
MongoDB.description: Lists all databases with their storage size.

MongoDB.name: Server Status Summary
MongoDB.description: Returns key server metrics (version, uptime, connections).
MongoDB.query: var s = db.serverStatus(); print('version: ' + s.version + ', uptime: ' + s.uptime + 's, connections: ' + s.connections.current)
